Container.Name: Voicebox TTS Server
Container.Overview:
Local AI TTS server for Hermes Agent voice messages. Headless/API-only build.
Features: - Voice Cloning (upload sample audio) - 7 TTS engines (Kokoro, LuxTTS, Qwen3-TTS, ...) - Fast CPU inference (no GPU needed) - REST API: POST /generate, GET /audio/{id} - 23 languages supported
Use with Hermes: text → Voicebox API → WAV/MP3 → ffmpeg → OGG → Telegram Voice
For private GHCR packages run docker login ghcr.io on Unraid first, or make the GHCR package public.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent voice profiles, generations, models, and cache.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Voicebox REST API port. Change host port if 17493 is already in use.

Config.Name: Preload Models
Config.Description: Download Kokoro model on first start (~82MB). Speeds up first TTS generation.
